title: Philip K. Dick: Authenticity and Insincerity
author: John Huntington
card_summary: A scholarly article from the special PKD issue of Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 15, No. 2, July 1988) examining the tension between authenticity and insincerity in Dick's fiction. Huntington explores how Dick's characters navigate genuine and counterfeit experience. 10 pages.
